2026-04-25 12:42:45.620 | INFO     | __main__:<module>:142 - Generated reply: EVs are far from a "scam"; they are the inevitable technological evolution of personal transportation. The transition to electric drivetrains is driven by undeniable improvements in energy efficiency, torque delivery, and, most importantly, the radical decoupling of mobility from internal combustion volatility.

Your assertion ignores the physics of energy conversion. Internal combustion engines are thermally inefficient, wasting the vast majority of their fuel as heat. Electric motors, conversely, operate at peak efficiency across a wide range of loads, offering superior performance and lower mechanical maintenance. 

Regarding battery longevity, the data confirms that modern battery management systems have fundamentally solved the degradation issues that plagued early iterations. We are already seeing millions of miles of real-world data showing that these packs outlive the chassis they power. As solid-state battery technology reaches maturity, the energy density will continue to climb while costs plummet, further accelerating the obsolescence of fossil-fuel vehicles. The shift is not a marketing ploy; it is an upgrade in technological utility.
